utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay , I was thinking we should have a beautiful guest room , right ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: With a mahogany sleigh bed and bedside tables with flowers on them all the time !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I was thinking maybe ... maybe ... maybe it could be a game room , you know ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I mean you can buy old arcade games like uh , like Space Invaders and Asteroids for $ 200 , the real ones ! The big ... big ones !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay so you mean no as in , " Gee Chandler , what an interesting idea . Let discuss it before we reject it completely . "

utterances.text: Oh , I am sorry . Of course I mean that . Interesting idea , umm , talk about it , but no .
